steps.title: Refer to the song
steps.content: The previous sentence names one song, I Need Love. The blank needs a singular pronoun that can serve as the subject of ranked and refer back to that one song.

steps.title: Reject plural pronouns
steps.content: Choice A and Choice B are plural, so they do not agree with the singular song. Choice C refers to individual members of a group, but no group is being selected from here. The answer is D.
